executives.name: Jay Jiang Yu
executives.background: Mr. Yu is the Founder and Executive Chairman of NANO Nuclear Energy Inc. He is a serial entrepreneur and has over 16 years of experience in capital markets and corporate restructuring. He has served as a consultant to several public companies and has been involved in numerous private and public financings.

executives.name: James Walker
executives.background: Mr. Walker is the Chief Executive Officer and a Director of NANO Nuclear Energy Inc. He has over 15 years of experience in the nuclear industry, including roles in engineering, project management, and executive leadership. He previously served as the CEO of a private nuclear technology company.

executives.name: Winston Chow
executives.background: Mr. Chow is the Chief Financial Officer of NANO Nuclear Energy Inc. He has over 25 years of experience in finance and accounting, including roles as CFO and Controller for several public and private companies. He is a Certified Public Accountant.

board_of_directors.name: Jay Jiang Yu
board_of_directors.background: Founder and Executive Chairman of NANO Nuclear Energy Inc.

board_of_directors.name: James Walker
board_of_directors.background: Chief Executive Officer and Director of NANO Nuclear Energy Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Lassina Zerbo
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Zerbo is the former Executive Secretary of the Comprehensive Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty Organization (CTBTO) and has served as the Prime Minister of Burkina Faso. He is a renowned expert in nuclear non-proliferation and international diplomacy.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Hill
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hill has over 40 years of experience in the nuclear industry, including senior leadership roles at major nuclear engineering firms. He is an expert in nuclear reactor design and safety.

sources.source_description: SEC Form 10-K Annual Report for the fiscal year ended September 30, 2023
